/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libmprpc.so -o ../../lib/libmprpc.so CMakeFiles/mprpc.dir/mprpcapplication.cc.o CMakeFiles/mprpc.dir/mprpcconfig.cc.o CMakeFiles/mprpc.dir/rpcprovider.cc.o   -L/home/buduan/ProJect/my_-mqrpc/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/buduan/ProJect/my_-mqrpc/lib -lprotobuf -lpthread
